title: Why Choose Us
content:
The PetStore Kenya Difference

Why pay double for old, imported kibble? Here is why Nairobi pet parents choose PetStore Kenya:

1. Always Cheaper (No Middle-Men)

We work directly with Kenyan manufacturers like Sigma Foods (Bravo) and Farmers Choice, bypassing all middlemen to offer prices that are up to 25% cheaper than Carrefour, Naivas, and Quickmart.

2. Ultra-Fresh Local Sourcing

Our local formulations are processed in Kenya and reach your pet's bowl within days of manufacture, preserving vital proteins, fats, and vitamin content without oxidation.

3. Powered by Loki Logistics

Our delivery engine offers seamless final-mile delivery across Nairobi. Orders placed before 1:00 PM get same-day delivery.

4. Kenyan First (Economic Impact)

Keep your money within Kenya! Every purchase supports poultry farmers, Rift Valley pasturelands, and Lake Victoria fishers.
excerpt: Discover the PetStore Kenya difference. Learn how we deliver fresher, cheaper, and locally sourced pet food in Nairobi.
